title: Qlog Contained CBOR Import Implementation Lane
summary: Extend the sibling qlog import package so it can hydrate the repository's contained CBOR output back into the retained model.
planned_changes: Add contained CBOR reader helpers and CBOR-specific import entry points to `Incursa.Qlog.Import`, keep the work out of `Incursa.Qlog` core, preserve the retained qlog model and extension data, and add requirement-homed tests that round-trip serializer-produced CBOR payloads through the new importer.
out_of_scope: Changing the existing CBOR serializer output format.
Sequential CBOR framing or any new append-oriented binary protocol.
verification_plan: Run SpecTrace validation, then add requirement-homed tests covering contained CBOR import, stream auto-detection, retained-model preservation, and invalid-input rejection with serializer-produced CBOR payloads.
